service.name: DoorDash Drive API
service.description_for_ai: On-demand delivery logistics API. Request a DoorDash driver to pick up and deliver packages, food, or goods. Available in US, Canada, Australia. Use for delivery fulfillment, same-day delivery, restaurant order delivery.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Request a DoorDash driver to pick up and deliver a package or food order. Returns tracking URL and estimated times.

external_delivery_id.description: Your unique order ID for this delivery. Used for idempotency and tracking.

pickup_address.description: Pickup address as string: '901 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94103'

pickup_business_name.description: Business name at pickup location for driver reference

pickup_phone_number.description: Pickup contact phone in E.164 format: +14155551234

pickup_instructions.description: Instructions for driver at pickup: 'Ring doorbell', 'Ask for John at counter'

dropoff_instructions.description: Delivery instructions: 'Leave at door', 'Call on arrival'

order_value.description: Order value in cents (USD). E.g. 2500 = $25.00. Used for insurance.

pickup_time.description: ISO 8601 scheduled pickup time. Omit for immediate pickup.
